heading: Selection of designated officers
label: 300ff–136 Selection of designated officers
notes: Effective DateSection effective as if enacted on , see , set out as an Effective Date of 2009 Amendment; Revival of Section note under .Sept. 30, 2009section 2(a)(3)(B) of Pub. L. 111–87section 300ff–11 of this title
amendments: Effective DateSection effective as if enacted on , see , set out as an Effective Date of 2009 Amendment; Revival of Section note under .Sept. 30, 2009section 2(a)(3)(B) of Pub. L. 111–87section 300ff–11 of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: For the purposes of receiving notifications and responses and making requests under this part on behalf of emergency response employees, the public health officer of each State shall designate 1 official or officer of each employer of emergency response employees in the State.

children.heading: Preference in making designations
children.label: b Preference in making designations
children.text: In making the designations required in subsection (a), a public health officer shall give preference to individuals who are trained in the provision of health care or in the control of infectious diseases.
